output.summary: Removed redundant headingId override from Form block and cleaned up manual aria-labelledby prop. Since Form was the only consumer of ThemeHeading's headingId prop, also removed headingId from ThemeHeading.php and ThemeHeading.tsx. The theme_block_props() helper automatically adds aria-labelledby when a block has a heading attribute, making the manual override unnecessary.

filesModified.purpose: Removed redundant $heading_id variable, manual aria-labelledby prop, and headingId from ThemeHeading args
Removed manual aria-labelledby from useBlockProps and headingId prop from ThemeHeading
Removed headingId prop support (no longer needed by any consumers)
Removed headingId prop from type definition, destructuring, and usage

issues: Pre-existing warning: Missing @var docblock for headingPosition, formId
